title: Device Home Screen - No Device connected - Supported List - Onboarding
scenario: Onboarding information for each device under "Supported devices" displays correctly when no device is connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is currently connected to the phone.
3. On the Home screen, tap the 'Supported devices' button.
4. On the Supported devices screen, locate the 'Onboarding' section.
5. Tap the first device listed under the 'Onboarding' section.
6. Observe the onboarding information displayed for that device.
7. Return to the Supported devices screen.
8. Tap the next device listed under the 'Onboarding' section.
9. Observe the onboarding information displayed for that device.
10. Repeat steps 7-9 for each remaining device listed under 'Onboarding'.
expected: Each device under the 'Onboarding' section displays the correct onboarding information specific to that device (e.g., device name, pairing instructions, features).
